examples: By computation of the correlation degree and the comprehensive index value, the comprehensive evaluation result of the reducer-turbodrill design schemes is obtained objectively.
Underwell reducer, categorized as downhole tools of turbodrill supporting equipment, is now still in the research and development stage. It can also be used in oil extraction fields.
This paper briefly introduces the typical high-steep structure of China and describes the structure and the energy converting method and characteristics of the turbodrill self developed.
